creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run looks fine.

However,  note that 3 ports depending on pandas fail to build currently (not new failures):

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/130i386-default-foo/2022-01-12_20h16m08s/logs/errors/py38-pandana-0.6.1.log
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/130i386-default-foo/2022-01-12_20h16m08s/logs/errors/py38-orca-1.6.log
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/130i386-default-foo/2022-01-12_20h16m08s/logs/errors/py38-nilearn-0.8.1.log
